---
title: "Alexander Lycurgus"
---

## Alexander Lycurgus

### Description

Greek Orthodox Archbishop of the Cyclades

### Biography

Mentioned in 1870 as present at the consecration of the Rt. Rev. John Fielder Mackarness as Bishop of Oxford.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
